title: Anyone that doesn't believe Alt. Treatments / Diet can't work. Watch this. Stage 4 Prostate Cancer w/Mets (Gleason 8)
body:
This man has Stage 4 Metastatic Prostate Cancer, Gleason 8 (Gleason 4 + 4)

One year ago roughly:

April 2019 - PSA = "In a few months my PSA dropped from 87.50 to 1.44"

[https://youtu.be/11ePfsh2mUQ](https://youtu.be/11ePfsh2mUQ)

Now:January 2020 - PSA = 0.1

While this one is in French, you can see his blood test results (0:28) which he shares:

[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ms6hUVLXluM](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ms6hUVLXluM)

He believes his 3 most important treatments are:

1. Baking Soda
2. Autophagy (Fasting)
3. Anti-Oxidant Food
